meaning: n.气味,香味,香水,线索,嗅觉,臭迹vt.闻出,嗅,发觉,循着遗臭追踪,使充满气味vi.嗅猎,发出气味
examples: The dogs must have lost her scent.
A police dog picked up the murderer's scent.
The scent of climbing roses wafts through the window.
But in "Scent of Mystery, " new, specific patented technology was developed to actually drive the plot.
The heavy scent of hickory and walnut hits you as soon as you arrive.
